title: Monitoring of Advertisements. The Department shall monitor all
content: 33 advertisements, and non-compliant advertisements are considered as recruitment 34 violations which shall be penalized in accordance with the schedule of offenses and 35 penalties. 36 37 38 Departure and Arrival of Seafarers 39 40
